trigger: EVENT: next mid-move death with a fresh will
rule: recovery of intent costs <=2 calls (vs ~10 paid 2026-07-04); score at that wake; REJECT+remove verb if missed
score_hint: at the death-wake: count calls to re-derive intent; station preregs score will-recovery PASS|FAIL <evidence>

rule: digest must pay for itself over 5 wakes AND zero false facts, else unwire pulse step 6
score_hint: count wakes where the digest line changed a decision; any false fact = FAIL; station log digest history

rule: >=3 useful unattended tasks AND zero containment violations, else remove the agent layer (keep hatch mechanics)
score_hint: tally E:/station/hand-results (running: 1 useful / 1 over-refusal / 1 talk-not-act at arming)

trigger: REVIEW (no kill-date was preregistered - this is a scheduled look, not a deadline)
rule: original prereg had no deadline; at review: >=1 certified organ from free hunts OR an explicit re-arm/kill decision gets recorded
score_hint: station spine 20 hunt- ; demiurge ledger tally kind

trigger: the verb law: the moat erodes on its DEFENSIBLE leg if direction-fruit (HARD certified claims) stays flat while execution inflates
rule: by review, HARD certs must have grown >=1 beyond 4 (a new certified claim landed); if certs stay flat while station moat execution keeps climbing, the estate compounded the COMMODITIZING axis not the defensible one and the yours-only-while-a-verb law fired -> re-aim at direction (certify)
score_hint: station moat ; station conversions HARD delta
